# Aromas

> Order food from your college canteen and skip the queue. Pre-order while in class and pick up when ready!

Aromas is a food ordering app for college students. Browse the menu from Sukh Sagar canteen, add items to your cart, and place orders for dine-in pickup. The app verifies you're on campus using geolocation and supports secure payments.

## Pages

- [/](/): Browse the full food menu, search items, filter by diet type, and add items to your cart.
